metadata.description: Core development workflow plugins for Claude Code with agent teams, specialized agents, and architecture skills

plugins.name: shared
plugins.description: Reusable agent team infrastructure — do-loop iteration protocol for doer+critic teammate pairs

plugins.name: feature-development
plugins.description: Systematic feature development with codebase exploration, architecture design, and team-based implementation loops (SOLID, Clean Architecture, Design Patterns, DDD)

plugins.name: review
plugins.description: Code review with focused investigation and parallel specialized reviewers for security, architecture, performance, and bug detection

plugins.name: bugfix
plugins.description: Systematic bug fixing with reproduction, root cause analysis, and team-based fix+review loops

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: Quality Assurance workflows with test writing, test execution, and browser testing via Playwright MCP for unit, integration, and E2E testing
